entry.name: formatPreset
entry.label: Active preset: plasma, pear, or custom.

entry.name: customFormat
entry.label: Custom multiline format with date/time tokens and BBCode.

entry.name: customFormatEdited
entry.label: Whether the user has edited the custom format since the last preset switch.

entry.name: lastPresetFormat
entry.label: Template copied into custom when switching to the custom preset.

entry.name: useSystemFont
entry.label: Use the Plasma panel font instead of a custom font.

entry.name: fontSize
entry.label: Custom font size in points. Ignored when useSystemFont is true.
